title: 冰隊狗公截查黃子悦：條女平時IG好大波，原來好細

replies.msg:
【即時】(19:50) 防暴警察在旺角搜查市民，前學民思潮召集人黃子悦和一名男子在豉油街及通菜街交界，即大家樂外被截查，要求她將智能電話解鎖。

防暴警察初時指二人已觸犯限聚令，及後又改口，要求黃子悦將智能電話解鎖，即出示拍攝了的影片。黃子悦拒絕，質疑對方沒有合理懷疑。有警員不耐煩，斥黃子悦搞事，「問下你自己點解係度啦」。

有守在封鎖線前的防暴警員出言侮辱，對另一名警員稱，「呢件衰過暴動，今次正。」另一名警員則回應稱，「條女平時IG好大波，原來好細。」黃子悦最後遭票控，稱警察曾稱其電話為偷回來，她表明不會繳交罰款，將尋求進一步的法律意見。她又提到，有警察對她作恐嚇，「話我衰過一次。」

在場的警察開咪，指在場人士已觸犯限聚令，屬受限制群組的聚集。多名油尖旺區議員包括林兆彬及陳梓維等在場監察，和進行拍攝。防暴警察在搜查黃子悦及朋友，有市民斥「黑警，賣冰毒」，警員發狂衝入人群，並拘捕至少二人，期間曾使用胡椒噴霧，其中一人更遭拖行。其中一名穿藍色上衣的男子在遭拘捕後，高呼其名字為劉曉峰。

林兆彬對獨媒表示，警察明顯濫用限聚令，指限聚令原來已無法無天的警權更為澎漲。他斥道，警察用鏡頭對準15分鐘後便能作出拘捕，顯然為打壓市民，「2個人又告，4個人又告，其實好多都係旺角街坊，食完飯經過，又要俾你噴胡椒。」

將篇新聞既性騷擾內容翻譯左做英文，需要各位手足幫手proofread後係twitter retweet比外國女權人士

[Hong Kong Police said ‘Her boobs were much bigger on her Instagram photos’ during stop and search on a former female member of Scholorism]

Former member of Scholorism, Prince Wong Ji-yuet and another man were stopped and searched by Hong Kong riot police in Mong Kok this evening.

At first the riot police accused them for violating the Prohibition on Group Gathering Regulation(which is nonsense since the maximum number of gathering people is 8). Riot police soon changed their words and ordered Prince to unlock her phone and show the video she has recorded that day. Prince refused and questioned them the reason of that, before a police got inpatient and said she was ‘making a scene’.

One of the riot police talked to his colleague ‘She was charged for riot before .This is great.’ and his colleague replied ‘This chick’s boobs look much bigger on her Instagram photos.’. Prince was then issued a Fixed Penalty Ticket. She declared that she won’t pay the penalty ticket and will ask for legal advice. She also mentioned that she was threatened by the riot police because she was once charged with riot.

#Feminism #sexualharassment #HKPOLICE
食冰狗

Prince refused and questioned them the reason of that, before a police got inpatient and said she was ‘making a scene’.

One of the riot police talked to his colleague ‘She was charged for riot before .This is great.’ and his colleague replied ‘This chick’s boobs look much bigger on her Instagram photos.’. Prince was then issued a Fixed Penalty Ticket. She declared that she won’t pay the penalty ticket and will ask for legal advice. She also mentioned that she was threatened by the riot police because she was once charged with riot.

#Feminism #sexualharassment #HKPOLICE
